# ChartingPath

> Pattern-based trading signal discovery, research, and automation platform with 380,000+ outcome-verified historical trades.

## About

ChartingPath is a web platform that helps traders discover, validate, and act on chart pattern setups. It combines automated pattern detection with historical performance data to give traders a statistical edge.

## Key Features

- **Live Pattern Screener**: 1,100+ instruments (stocks, forex, crypto, indices) scanned for active chart patterns across multiple timeframes. Patterns are detected on closed candles with quality scoring.
- **Edge Atlas**: Historical win rates, expectancy, and annualized edge for every pattern+timeframe+asset combination. Based on 380,000+ resolved pattern occurrences.
- **Pattern Lab**: Backtest any chart pattern on any ticker with historical data. Includes equity curves, drawdown analysis, and trade logs.
- **Learning Center**: 100+ educational articles covering chart patterns, candlestick patterns, technical indicators, trading strategies, risk management, and algorithmic trading.
- **Pattern Library**: Visual reference for all supported chart patterns with identification rules, trading rules, and Bulkowski statistics.
- **Trading Copilot**: AI assistant with access to live pattern data and the Edge Atlas historical database.
- **Alerts**: Get notified when specific pattern setups appear on your watchlist instruments.
- **Script Generator**: Export ready-to-use Pine Script and MQL code for pattern-based strategies.

## Pattern Win Rate Data (at 2R risk-reward)

These statistics are computed from 380,000+ resolved pattern trades across stocks, forex, crypto, indices, and commodities:

| Pattern | Total Trades | Win Rate |
|---------|-------------|----------|
| Inverse Head and Shoulders | 3,585 | 37.8% |
| Cup & Handle | 672 | 37.4% |
| Ascending Triangle | 4,363 | 37.1% |
| Double Bottom | 11,949 | 36.1% |
| Symmetrical Triangle | 46,436 | 36.1% |
| Donchian Breakout (Long) | 7,601 | 35.9% |
| Bull Flag | 101 | 35.6% |
| Falling Wedge | 33,584 | 35.4% |
| Triple Bottom | 37,394 | 35.0% |
| Bear Flag | 60 | 30.0% |
| Inverse Cup & Handle | 23,228 | 24.9% |
| Rising Wedge | 37,781 | 23.7% |
| Double Top | 13,905 | 23.0% |
| Descending Triangle | 4,604 | 22.7% |
| Head and Shoulders | 4,113 | 22.2% |
| Triple Top | 51,097 | 22.2% |
| Donchian Breakout (Short) | 99,412 | 22.0% |

Note: Win rate alone does not determine profitability. At 2R risk-reward, a pattern only needs >33.3% win rate to have positive expectancy. See individual pattern statistics pages for full breakdowns.

## Methodology

- Patterns are detected algorithmically on closed candles (no intra-candle signals)
- Each pattern includes entry price, stop-loss, and take-profit levels
- Historical outcomes are tracked at multiple risk-reward ratios (2R, 3R, 4R, 5R)
- Quality scoring considers trend alignment, volume confirmation, and pattern geometry
- All assumptions are documented; no black-box signals
